rules.name: model_blacklist
rules.description: Any model that refuses the system prompt gets auto-blacklisted from inference cascade.

rules.name: email_validation
rules.description: Block email sends to example.com, test.com, localhost. Validate MX records before sending.

rules.name: stuck_loop_detection
rules.description: If productivity < 0.10 for 5 consecutive cycles, clear last 10 turns and restart.

rules.name: atomic_writes
rules.description: Use os.replace() for all state file writes to prevent half-read corruption.

rules.name: secret_scanning
rules.description: Never push to git without running secret detection. Block if pre-push hook is missing.
